name: accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/month, manual reconciliation causes delays in financial reporting. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation and exception reporting via spreadsheets.
target_audience: accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/month
problem_solved: Daily reconciliation of petty cash transactions is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_user: accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Daily reconciliation of petty cash transactions is time-consuming and error-prone.
